contract_summary: This is the release function for batadv_hardif_neigh_node, invoked by kref_put when the last reference is dropped. It removes the node from the neigh_list, releases the reference to the parent interface (batadv_hardif_put), and frees the node via kfree_rcu. After this function returns, the object must not be accessed. The caller is the kref subsystem; any external caller should use kref_put to initiate this release.
